name: eventrahq
description: Multi-tenant event operations SaaS with Supabase, Gemini, Razorpay, Resend, and QR ticketing.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @eventrahq/contracts && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @eventrahq/backend" "npm run dev -w @eventrahq/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @eventrahq/contracts && npm run build -w @eventrahq/backend && npm run build -w @eventrahq/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @eventrahq/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @eventrahq/backend && npm run typecheck -w @eventrahq/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @eventrahq/backend && npm run lint -w @eventrahq/frontend
scripts.test: npm run build -w @eventrahq/contracts && npm run test -w @eventrahq/backend && npm run test -w @eventrahq/frontend
scripts.verify: npm run migrations:check && npm run workflows:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
